title: [InstCombine] Fix crash on large integers in visitShl
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/redundant-left-shift-input-masking-no-widen.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/redundant-left-shift-input-masking-no-widen.ll
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..f5c52691199e4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/redundant-left-shift-input-masking-no-widen.ll
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py
+; RUN: opt < %s -passes=instcombine -S | FileCheck %s
+
+; Type is too large and widening it would make it bigger than MAX_INT_BITS
+define i5754496 @bw_no_widening(i5754496 %arg) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @bw_no_widening(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SHL1:%.*]] = shl i5754496 [[ARG:%.*]], 8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SHL2:%.*]] = ashr exact i5754496 [[SHL1]], 7
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i5754496 [[SHL2]]
+;
+  %shl1 = shl i5754496 %arg, 8
+  %ashr = ashr exact i5754496 %shl1, 8
+  %shl2 = shl i5754496 %ashr, 1
+  ret i5754496 %shl2
+}

tests.test_body:
define i5754496 @bw_no_widening(i5754496 %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @bw_no_widening(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SHL1:%.*]] = shl i5754496 [[ARG:%.*]], 8
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SHL2:%.*]] = ashr exact i5754496 [[SHL1]], 7
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i5754496 [[SHL2]]
  %shl1 = shl i5754496 %arg, 8
  %ashr = ashr exact i5754496 %shl1, 8
  %shl2 = shl i5754496 %ashr, 1
  ret i5754496 %shl2
}
